case_title: LONGAWAY, ALEC J. VS DAVIS, MICHELLE DBA DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, MICHELLE DBA DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP PAUL, LAURI DBA DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP GUERRERO V. ESPINOZA TRUST

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,162.50 FILED BY LONGAWAY, ALEC J. AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, MICHELLE DBA DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP PAUL, LAURI DBA DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP GUERRERO V. ESPINOZA TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LONGAWAY, ALEC J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAVIS, MICHELLE DBA DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP PAUL, LAURI DBA DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP GUERRERO V. ESPINOZA TRUST THE DEFENDANT DID NOT MAIL THE FINAL COPY OF THE TENANT LEDGER TO PLAINTIFF UNTIL 2/23/05 PER THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT THE HEARING. HOWEVER EXCEPT FOR THE REPLACEMENT OF A BROKEN WINDOW ON 1/13/05, NO OTHER REPAIRS OR CLEANING COSTS WERE CHARGED TO PLAINTIFF AND THEREFORE, NO ADDITIONAL EXPLANATION WAS REQUIRED OTHER THAN THE RETENTION OF COSTS FOR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
